abilities.description: Choose target instant or sorcery spell that targets only a single permanent or player. Copy that spell for each other permanent or player the spell could target. Each copy targets a different one of those permanents and players.

effect.description: Choose target instant or sorcery spell that targets only a single permanent or player. Copy that spell for each other permanent or player the spell could target. Each copy targets a different one of those permanents and players.
effect.name: CopySpellAbility

abilities.target_prompt: Choose target instant or sorcery spell that targets only a single permanent or player
